step_title: trusted system broadcast group_context persistence repair
summary: 修复了 post_message() 中已校正 MessageCreate 再次 generic normalize 导致的第一掉点；现在用 validated payload 回填 author_kind 与 context_block，避免 trusted system/group_context 在 persistence 前被清空并塌回 plain message.posted。
blocker: code proof: post_message() now writes payload.resolved_author_kind back into canonical_message_v2.author_kind and payload.context_block back into canonical_message_v2.context_block/content.context_block before persistence
